3216310.name: Sword Road
3216310.description:
Inspired by the flash game 'Strengthening Sword', this game was created.

Combat is the same as the 3D Vampire Survival genre, but other content is point-and-click.

The player has nothing but 2000 gold that was initially given.

I recommend you buy a wood sword with that sword, because you have to kill the monster to get the item!

Once you get the item, you can build a sword that is stronger than a wood sword.

If you make a sword, you can go to the store and sell it. Weapons only, material items cannot be sold.

Think about how to make gold and survive to the end by monsters for 2 minutes.

Controls

Move Player - WASD

Attack Key - Q

Move Item - Drag and Drop
